usage: gui_highlight_safety_mechanism [-help] {[-dcls {insts nets_internal nets_interface nets_common nets_top} | -tmr {parents clones voters} | -ser {insts}]} [-dcls {insts nets_internal nets_interface nets_common nets_top} [-group <string>]] [-tmr {parents clones voters} [-inst <string>]] [-group <string> [-exclusive_groups ]] [-color <string> | -auto_color ]

options.name: -dcls
options.description: {insts nets_internal nets_interface nets_common nets_top} Highlight dcls group's insts, internal-nets, interface-nets, common-nets or top-nets

options.name: -exclusive_groups
options.description: As well as highlighting the insts/nets of the specified group, highlight the same features of it's exclusive groups

options.name: -group
options.description: Highlight the features of this dcls group only

options.name: -inst
options.description: Highlight the features of this tmr inst only

options.name: -tmr
options.description: Highlight tmr parents, tmr clones or tmr voters
